Liste Citoyenne Salonnaise

Salon en commun

  • Qu’est-ce qu’une liste citoyenne participative ?
  • Assemblées citoyennes
  • Profession de foi
  • Les candidats
  • Nous contacter

Write pages in Markdown.

Heading Two

Any text with no empty lines between will become a paragraph. Leave an blank line between headings and paragraphs. Font can be Italic or Bold. Code can be highlighted with backticks.

Hyperlinks look like this GitHub Help.

Lists

A bullet list is created using *, +, or -, like:

  • dog
  • cat
  • muffin

A numbered list is created using a number + ., like:

  1. one
  2. two
  3. three
  4. four

Horizontal rule:

A block quote. Is like this.

A Table

header column a column b
dogs 3 6
cats 3 6
muffins 15 30

Use Includes to Add Features

Some Content

Hey there!

This is more info

Example card

Some interesting text

This is an example alert!
